messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0166",
  "title": "社交娱乐",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 社交娱乐

JustTalk

Bass Booster & Equalizer

Kito

message.content: This section covers the topic of "Social Entertainment" (社交娱乐) and lists three entities: JustTalk, Bass Booster & Equalizer, and Kito. It can answer retrieval questions regarding which specific applications or software products are categorized under social entertainment in this document. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
